meta.description: Full end-to-end podcast production pipeline. Webhook trigger receives topic + config → GPT-4o writes script → ElevenLabs generates voice track (parallel) → HeyGen generates avatar intro (parallel) → Kling AI generates b-roll for each segment (parallel) → Merge artifacts → Notify via Telegram. All video/audio generation is async. This workflow orchestrates; actual generation jobs run in sub-workflows or resolve via callbacks.
meta.architecture: async-first — n8n orchestrates, never sits on the hot path

nodes.name: Podcast Job Trigger
nodes.notes: POST body: { topic, voice_clone_id, avatar_id, voice_id, notify_chat_id }

values.content: You are a podcast scriptwriter. Write engaging, conversational scripts. Output JSON with keys: narration (full TTS text), intro_sentence (15-20 words for avatar), segments (array of strings split on topic for b-roll).

nodes.name: ElevenLabs Voice Track
nodes.notes: Runs in parallel with HeyGen and Kling jobs

nodes.name: HeyGen Avatar Intro
nodes.notes: Async — returns video_id. Poll or use webhook for completion.

body.prompt: ={{ 'Cinematic b-roll for podcast topic: ' + $json.topic + ', studio setting, soft lighting, 4K photorealistic' }}

nodes.name: Kling B-Roll (Parallel)
nodes.notes: Submits all segments. Callbacks arrive at kling-broll-auto-generator webhook.

parameters.text:
=🎙 Podcast pipeline submitted!
Job: {{ $json.job_id }}
ElevenLabs: ✅ audio ready
HeyGen avatar: queued (ID: {{ $json.heygen_video_id }})
Kling b-roll: queued (task: {{ $json.kling_task_id }})
You'll receive callbacks as each video completes.
